definition: Wholesome thinking free from ill will in the MN 19 twofold division.
notes: Use this record in ethical-thinking contexts such as MN 19. Keep the compound aligned with the project's explicit non-ill-will wording rather than broadening it into kindness-language.

example_phrases.notes: Second member of the wholesome class in MN 19.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use for MN 19-style ethical analysis of wholesome thinking free from ill will.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not broaden the phrase into kindness-language or flatten it into a generic good feeling when the structural link to byāpāda matters.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the compound from drifting away from the byāpāda / abyāpāda pair.
